import zipfile
with zipfile.ZipFile\('/c/Users/ilils/Downloads/dasdasdasd/cobblemon-events-ultra-small-no-cobblemon-jar/cobblemon-events-mod-final/datapacks/CobbleDomes_18Type_Datapack_1_21x.zip'\) as z:

        try:
            print\(f'=== {name} ==='\)
            print\(z.read\(name\).decode\('utf-8'\)\)
        except Exception as e:
            print\(f'ERROR: {e}'\)
    print\('=== build_all.mcfunction ==='\)
    print\(z.read\('data/cobbledomes/functions/build_all.mcfunction'\).decode\('utf-8'\)\)
    print\('=== build/hub.mcfunction \(first 60 lines\) ==='\)
    lines = z.read\('data/cobbledomes/functions/build/hub.mcfunction'\).decode\('utf-8'\).splitlines\(\)
    print\('\\n'.join\(lines[:60]\)\)
    print\('=== build/types/fire.mcfunction \(first 40 lines\) ==='\)
    lines = z.read\('data/cobbledomes/functions/build/types/fire.mcfunction'\).decode\('utf-8'\).splitlines\(\)
    print\('\\n'.join\(lines[:40]\)\)
")
